_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Coordinate and provide expert technical support to enterprise-wide cyber defense technicians to resolve cyber defense incidents.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including training data provenance requirements, model registry controls, and LLM application security requirements.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.466), DG-T-007 (DG, cosine: 0.462).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.9/10 (raw 0.393). Shared vocabulary: [enterprise]. DCWF-only terms [coordinate, cyber, defense, expert, incidents, provide] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, application, controls, data, develop, llm] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.877, R=0.856). P exceeds R by 0.021 — the DCWF element's 16 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.7%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Coordinate and provide expert technical support to enterprise-wide cyber defense" and "Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including trainin". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.496 > STS 0.393 (gap +0.103). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [enterprise] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.5%. Shared tokens: [enterprise]. DCWF-only: [coordinate, cyber, defense, expert, incidents, provide]. WIDAI-only: [ai, application, controls, data, develop, llm].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 99.7% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
